messages.content: What is one upon cos x ?
The reciprocal of cos(x) is sec(x), Sir.
what is integration of sec X
The integral of sec(x) is ln|sec(x) + tan(x)|, Sir.
The integral of sec(x) is equal to log|sec(x) + tan(x)|, Sir.
The integral of sec(x) is log|sec(x) + tan(x)| + C, where C is the constant of integration, Sir.
what is integration of 1 upon 1 + x square + 5 raise to x
That's a complex integral, Sir. The integral of 1 / (1 + x^2) is arctan(x), but the integral of 5^x is (5^x) / ln(5), and combining these with the given expression is quite involved, Sir.
what is integration of 1 upon 1 + x square + 5 ratio x
I think you meant 5^x, Sir. The integral of 1 / (1 + x^2 + 5^x) doesn't have a straightforward solution, it's a complex integral that might require numerical methods or approximation, Sir.
